lang.name: English
title: Jellymesh
subtitle: Federate Jellyfin servers, dedupe libraries, share watch state.
lang.label: Dashboard language
status.summary: {peers} peers ({online} online) - {cached} cached items - dedup ratio {ratio}
public.url: Our public base URL (advertised to peers; may differ from this server's bind URL)
settings.dedup: Enable deduplication (merge matching items across peers)
settings.show_remote: Show items that exist only on peer servers (virtual Friends Library)
settings.watch_sync: Sync watch state (resume position, played flag) across peers
peers.empty: No peer servers configured. Add one or send/receive an access request.
peers.field.name: Display name
peers.field.baseurl.hint: Where this server can reach the peer (LAN IP / hostname).
peers.field.localuser: Local user receiving peer watch state
peers.field.localuser.hint: Leave empty to disable pull-direction sync for this peer.
peers.field.req_per_h.hint: When exceeded we respond 429 with Retry-After.
peers.field.fedkey.placeholder: What the peer issued for us
peers.field.remoteuser.placeholder: Peer user id we push UserData to
peers.field.localuser.placeholder: Our user id we mirror peer state into
shares.libs.label: libs
shares.key.label: key
shares.delete.confirm.title: Revoke share key?
shares.delete.confirm.body: The friend using this key will lose access immediately.
shares.mint.label: Label
shares.mint.strict: Strict mode: also hide items with unrated or regional ratings (FSK-12, 16+, BBFC-18). Required for true kid-safe scoping.
shares.mint.can_intro: Allow this key to request introductions on me
shares.mint.mode: Mint mode (when this key asks me to introduce)
shares.mint.mode.request: Request (queue for admin approval, safe default)
shares.mint.done.title: Share key generated
shares.mint.done.body: Hand this key to your friend:
shares.intro: Generate a key per friend, optionally restricted to specific libraries. Hand the key to the friend; they paste it into their plugin's peer config under "Federation share key".
libs.pick.title: Pick libraries to share
libs.pick.hint: Uncheck all to share every library.
requests.intro: Ask peers to add a film, or triage what peers asked from you.
requests.send.summary: Send a request to a peer
requests.send.title: Title (optional if TMDB)
requests.send.need_input: Provide either a TMDB id or a title
requests.send.fail.502: Peer rejected the request - they may not have your share key, or their plugin is offline.
requests.send.fail.404: Unknown peer - refresh the peer list and try again.
requests.send.fail.400: Send failed - your FederationShareKey for this peer or your PublicBaseUrl is unset.
intros.intro: Ask an existing peer to introduce you a new contact, or triage incoming introduction requests.
intros.step1: Pick which existing peer will act as introducer (they must trust us).
intros.step2: Browse their peers to choose who to be introduced to.
intros.directory.empty: This peer publishes no directory (PublishPeerDirectory off on their side).
intros.also_forward: Also forward the issued key to the new peer (if we have a share key with them)
intros.send.no_target: Pick a peer and select the new peer URL
intros.send.no_target.enter: Pick a peer and enter the new peer URL
intros.send.result.title: Introduction result
intros.revoke.simple: Revoke this introduction-key? (No downstream keys depend on it.)
intros.revoke.cascade_warn: {count} downstream keys also depend on this one. Cascade revoke?
privacy.desc: Master switches for unsolicited inbound contact. Turn off to refuse all new requests regardless of any per-key or per-token rule.
privacy.directory: Publish our peer list (name + URL only) to trusted peers so they can browse who to be introduced to.
handshake.desc: Bootstrap a peering without going through a third party. The other side's admin approves before any key crosses the wire.
handshake.access.gating: Access request gating (inbound, when admin enables them above)
handshake.access.open: Open: accept access requests from any origin (rate-limited per IP)
handshake.access.allowlist: Allowed origins (comma-separated URLs; bypasses rate limit)
handshake.access.tokens.label: Label
handshake.access.tokens.delete.confirm.b: Anyone who already received it can no longer request access with it.
handshake.access.tokens.created.title: Invite token created
handshake.access.tokens.created.body: Hand this token to the peer:
handshake.request.token: Their invite token (if they gave you one)
handshake.request.mutual: Request mutual access (they grant + we grant back)
handshake.request.sent.title: Access request sent
handshake.request.sent.body: Wait for the peer admin to approve.
handshake.invite.send: Invite a peer (push a pre-minted key)
handshake.invite.mutual: Mutual invite (they accept and grant back)
handshake.invite.sent.title: Invite sent
handshake.invite.sent.body: The peer admin will accept on their dashboard.
handshake.row.block.confirm.title: Block this peer?
handshake.row.block.confirm.body: They will not be able to contact us anymore, even via intermediaries.
handshake.row.approved.title: Approved
handshake.row.approved.body: Granted callback sent to the peer.
handshake.row.accepted.title: Accepted
handshake.request.sent.toast: Access request sent. Wait for the peer admin to approve.
handshake.invite.sent.toast: Invite sent. The peer admin will accept on their dashboard.
diag.running: Running probes against each enabled peer...
diag.push.label: Push invalidation: {status}
